name: rpa-runtime
description: D2+ 프로덕션 런타임 — 계약(ts/·schema/·db/)과 검증된 codegen 산출물을 PostgreSQL·Worker에 연결한다. 계약 SSoT는 상위 디렉터리(consumed, not redefined).

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: tsx test/flow-control.unit.ts && tsx test/telemetry.unit.ts && tsx test/rbac.unit.ts && tsx test/raw-cdp.unit.ts && npm run test:gateway-unit && npm run test:dom-executor && tsx test/graphile-runner.unit.ts
scripts.test:gateway-unit: tsx test/llm-gateway.unit.ts && tsx test/codex-sse-adapter.unit.ts && tsx test/codex-sse-transport.unit.ts
scripts.test:int: tsx test/run-transition.int.ts && tsx test/runtime-worker-claim.int.ts && tsx test/runtime-worker-resume.int.ts && tsx test/runtime-worker-abort-finalization.int.ts && tsx test/executor-invocation-recorder.int.ts && tsx test/action-plan-cache.int.ts && tsx test/graphile-worker.int.ts && tsx test/gateway-artifact-sink.int.ts && tsx test/api-runs-graphile.int.ts && tsx test/api-runs.int.ts && tsx test/api-runs-abort.int.ts && tsx test/api-human-tasks.int.ts && tsx test/api-dlq.int.ts && tsx test/api-reads.int.ts && tsx test/api-security.int.ts && tsx test/scenarios.int.ts && tsx test/security-audit.int.ts
scripts.test:ci: npm run test && npm run test:executor && npm run test:int
